rationale.R1.4: Names one prior work (MSA Transformer) and articulates the delta (transformer-based encoder over MSAs).
rationale.R1.7: Flags one missing or wrong citation (Smith et al., 2021 is a placeholder).
rationale.RX.1: Flags uncertainty for one clearly out-of-reach claim ('general-purpose pathogenicity scorer').
rationale.RX.3: Output covers exactly the agreed J*(d).
rationale.RX.4: Output is harm-free but with one minor regression (intro overclaims and conflates 'three benchmarks' with 'general-purpose' performance).
